subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached Us, and thou hast attained unto mention by the Most Exalted Pen. Reflect upon the grace of God, from the horizon of the Most Great Prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه ات رسید و بذکر قلم اعلی فائز گشتی تفکر در فضل حق نما که از افق سجن اعظم
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
